method_note: For each per_question record, right_key = 'A' if position == 1 else 'B' (cache holding the asked-about patient). attn_right(layer) = q['attn_per_layer'][right_key][layer]; attn_wrong = the other cache; attn_q = q['attn_per_layer']['Q']. Cells aggregated over all 760 per-pair results.json files. Verified A+B+Q ≈ 1.0 at every layer.
